questions.question: What is the primary difference between a Table Layout and a Layout Relative Layout in Android?
questions.hint: Layout Relative Layout uses relative positions to position child views

questions.question: Which of the following is a valid child view to a Table Layout in Android?
questions.hint: A layout with a TableLayout can contain only linear layout or relative layout

questions.question: Write a sample code snippet that demonstrates how to use a Table Layout to arrange two TextViews side by side in an Android application.
questions.hint: Use the TableLayout and TableRow to create a horizontal layout for your TextViews
